prose.en: Provide the capability to disconnect or disable remote access to the system within {param:ac-17.09_odp}.

guidance.en: The speed of system disconnect or disablement varies based on the criticality of missions or business functions and the need to eliminate immediate or future remote access to systems.

prose.en: the capability to disconnect or disable remote access to the system within {param:ac-17.09_odp} is provided.

objects.en: procedures addressing disconnecting or disabling remote access to the system
system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms implementing capability to disconnect or disable remote access to system

guidelines.en: the time period within which to disconnect or disable remote access to the system is defined;
